name: Smartsheet
tagline: Read and update Smartsheet sheets, columns, reports, and users
description: List and retrieve Smartsheet sheets and reports, add columns to a sheet, and list account users. Requires a Smartsheet personal API access token (Business or Enterprise plan) or an OAuth2 access token.

auth.hint: Generate a personal API access token from your Smartsheet account (Personal Settings > API Access) and send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN>. OAuth2 access tokens obtained via the full authorization flow work the same way.

tools.name: list_sheets
tools.description: List all sheets the authenticated user has access to, with an abbreviated summary for each.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of sheets to return per page (default 100).

params.name: modifiedSince
params.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; only return sheets modified on or after this date and time.

tools.name: get_sheet
tools.description: Retrieve a single sheet's full details, including rows, columns, and metadata.

params.name: sheetId
params.description: ID of the sheet to retrieve.

tools.name: add_column
tools.description: Add a new column to a sheet.

params.name: sheetId
params.description: ID of the sheet to add the column to.

params.name: type
params.description: Column type, e.g. TEXT_NUMBER, DATE, CHECKBOX, or PICKLIST.

params.name: index
params.description: Position where the column should be inserted.

tools.name: list_reports
tools.description: List all reports the authenticated user has access to.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of reports to return per page (default 100).

params.name: modifiedSince
params.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; only return reports modified on or after this date and time.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List all users in the authenticated user's Smartsheet organization.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of users to return per page (default 100).

params.name: includeAll
params.description: Return all results in a single page, ignoring pagination.
